case_title: ACCU-TECH CORP., A CORP. VS. IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ACCU-TECH CORP., A CORP. SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCU-TECH CORP., A CORP. ON DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ACCU-TECH CORP., A CORP. SERVED AUG-14-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $241.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT IDEX GLOBAL SERVICES, INC., A CORP.
